memoryArtifacts.headline: AGNES HOWARD, DUCHESS OF NORFOLK
memoryArtifacts.description: Agnes Howard (née Tilney) (c. 1477 – May 1545) was the second wife of Thomas Howard, 2nd Duke of Norfolk. Two of King Henry VIII's queens were her step-granddaughters, Anne Boleyn and Katherine Howard …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Hugh Tilney於1416年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾波斯頓時，他的父親Sir Phillip Tilney16歲，母親Isabel de Thorpe22歲。他和Eleanor Tailboys至少有2個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1488年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可享年72歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Hugh Tilney于1416年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾波斯頓时，他的父亲Sir Phillip Tilney16岁，母亲Isabel de Thorpe22岁。他和Eleanor Tailboys至少有2个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1488年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯吉爾貝可享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Tilney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Tilney (Norfolk), which derives its name from the Old English personal name Tila, Tilla (genitive Tilan, Tillan) + Old English ēg ‘island’.

nameMeanings.name: Hugh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, Hugues, Hugo, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from hug ‘heart, mind, spirit’. It was originally a short form of various compound names containing this element. This was borne by the aristocracy of medieval France, adopted by the Normans, and introduced by them to Britain. It was consistently one of the most popular boys' names in the Middle Ages in England, but fell out of favour in the 16th century until it was revived in the 20th century. Little Hugh of Lincoln was a child supposed in the Middle Ages to have been murdered by Jews in about 1255 , a legend responsible for several outbursts of anti-Semitism at various times. The story is referred to by Chaucer in The Prioress's Tale. He is not to be confused with St Hugh of Lincoln ( 1140–1200 ), bishop of Lincoln ( 1186–1200 ), who was noted for his charity and good works, his piety, and his defence of the Church against the State. Since the later Middle Ages Hugh has also been used as an Anglicized form of the Gaelic name Aodh .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Hugh Tilney was born in 1416, in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Phillip Tilney, was 16 and his mother, Isabel de Thorpe, was 22. He had at least 2 sons and 1 daughter with Eleanor Tailboys. He died in 1488, in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Hugh Tilney est né en 1416, à Boston, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Phillip Tilney, avait 16 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Thorpe, avait 22 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille avec Eleanor Tailboys. Il est décédé en 1488, à Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Hugh Tilney 1416 in Boston, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Phillip Tilney 16 und seine Mutter Isabel de Thorpe 22. Er hatte mit Eleanor Tailboys mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1488 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Tilney è nato il nel 1416 nel Boston, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Phillip Tilney, aveva 16 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Thorpe, aveva 22 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia con Eleanor Tailboys. Morì nel 1488, nel Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Tilneyが1416年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアボストンで生まれた時，父Sir Phillip Tilneyは16歳，母Isabel de Thorpeは22歳であった。彼はEleanor Tailboysとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1488年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスキルベックで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Hugh Tilney(이)가 1416년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Phillip Tilney(은)는 16세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Thorpe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 Eleanor Tailboys(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1488년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스커벡에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Hugh Tilney nasceu em 1416, em Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Phillip Tilney, tinha 16 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Thorpe, tinha 22 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha com Eleanor Tailboys. Ele faleceu em 1488, em Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Hugh Tilney родился в 1416 г. в местности бостон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Phillip Tilney было 16 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Thorpe, 22. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь от Eleanor Tailboys. Он умер в 1488 г. в местности скирбекк, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Hugh Tilney nació en 1416, en Boston, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Phillip Tilney, tenía 16 años y su mamá, Isabel de Thorpe, tenía 22 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija con Eleanor Tailboys. Murió en 1488, en Skirbeck, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
